zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus於1449年10月16日出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可時，他的父親George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest32歲，母親Isabel Sibbald34歲。他於1468年3月4日與Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年11月29日之後在蘇格蘭維托史爾，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭維托史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus于1449年10月16日出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可时，他的父亲George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest32岁，母亲Isabel Sibbald34岁。他于1468年3月4日与Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1513年11月29日之后在苏格兰維托史爾，埋葬在英国苏格兰維托史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus was born on 16 October 1449, in North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest, was 32 and his mother, Isabel Sibbald, was 34. He married Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus on 4 March 1468. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died after 29 November 1513, in Whithorn, Wigtownshire, Scotland, and was buried in Whithorn, Wigtownshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus est né le 16 octobre 1449, à North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabel Sibbald, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus le 4 mars 1468. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé après 29 novembre 1513, à Whithorn, Wigtownshire, Écosse, et a été enterré à Whithorn, Wigtownshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus am 16. Oktober 1449 in North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest 32 und seine Mutter Isabel Sibbald 34. Er hat am 4. März 1468 Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb nach 29. November 1513 in Whithorn, Wigtownshire, Scotland und wurde in Whithorn, Wigtownshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus è nato il il 16 ottobre 1449 nel North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Sibbald, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus il 4 marzo 1468. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 29 novembre 1513, nel Whithorn, Wigtownshire, Scotland, e fu sepolto a Whithorn, Wigtownshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angusが1449年10月16日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアノース バーウィックで生まれた時，父George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forestは32歳，母Isabel Sibbaldは34歳であった。1468年3月4日にElizabeth Boyd Countess of Angusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年11月29日以後にスコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアウィソルンで死去し，イギリススコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアウィソルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 압어네시
ko.lifeSummary: Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus(이)가 1449년 10월 16일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 노르스 버윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Sibbald(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1468년 3월 4일 Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 11월 29일 이후 스컷랜드 위그타운실르 휘토른에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 위그타운실르 휘토른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus nasceu em 16 de outubro de 1449, em North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Sibbald, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus em 4 de março de 1468. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus родился 16 октября 1449 г. в местности норт бирвикк, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Sibbald, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus 4 марта 1468 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер после 29 ноябрь 1513 г. в местности уитаурн, вигтоуншир, Шотландия и был похоронен в местности уитаурн, вигтоуншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus el 4 de marzo de 1468. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 29 de noviembre de 1513, en Whithorn, Wigtownshire, Scotland, y fue sepultado en Whithorn, Wigtownshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
